---
agent: instructions-generator
---
Take the information below and generate a [NAME].instructions.md file for it in the /.github/ instructions directory, otherwise generate an apropeate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and easy to follow and not to long.
Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to include a link to the new instructions file.
If no information is provided below, prompt the user to provide information about the architecture, tech stack, coding standards to document, file organization, and any priority guidelines for the project.
the .md file shloud have frontmatter with a description property that informs copilot of when to use this set of instructions.
